Enerlysis — Dutch University Research Instrument Search

Source-backed search for publicly listed instruments and facilities at Dutch universities and university-linked research centres. The database is designed to help users discover public infrastructure faster, while still verifying access, specifications, and booking conditions directly with the institution.

Public sources only Verify before relying Searchable by instrument & university

Important legal note

This site includes disclaimer and terms-of-use section. The database is informational, that no warranty is given, and that users must verify details with the original institution before making decisions.

  • Information is compiled from public sources and may become outdated, incomplete, or inaccurate.
  • No professional, legal, procurement, or booking advice is provided.
  • Use of this site is at the user’s own risk, to the fullest extent permitted by applicable law.
Read full termsPrivacy policyContact Enerlysis

Dutch university research instruments and facilities

One searchable, source-first index of public university research infrastructure in the Netherlands. The broad national database is combined here with detailed TU Delft, UTwente, TU/e, Groningen/UMCG, Wageningen and Maastricht University expansions, while keeping records source-backed and confidence-labelled.

Source-first database. Records are based on public university facility, equipment, core-facility, infrastructure or official research pages. Capability details are included only where the public source states them.
Coverage note. This is an extensive verified public-source pass, not a legal claim of national completeness. Older, sparse or hierarchy-only public pages are marked with lower-confidence wording so the database does not overstate current access or specifications.
